curation_notes: Patch commit 1c24219d found directly from the advisory references. Only 1 non-test source file changed (index.js). The fix replaces `new Buffer(proxy.auth)` with `Buffer.from(proxy.auth)` inside the `connect` callback function (HttpsProxyAgent.prototype.callback). No sibling files exist — index.js is the sole source file in this package. Vulnerability class buffer-overflow retained from pre-assigned CWE-125 (Out-of-bounds Read) mapping; the Node.js Buffer(number) constructor allocates uninitialized heap memory, enabling out-of-bounds reads of sensitive data.
